items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
💝🔔 New Upgrade🔔 Comes with bag charm clip 🎀➕ Gift box 🎁➕ Upgraded manual 💌
❤️Goyard (Goyard) has undergone multiple research and improvements, constantly upgrading the fabric and leather. Exclusive customization TM️ is only to constantly meet customers' high-quality requirements 🔝🔝
The base fabric uses high-quality custom rain-dyed hemp consistent with ZP 〽️, coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛🤘 Flexible and not prickly 💪🤓 Matching symmetrical patterns, pure colors with no color difference 😘 Check details in the pictures [Bow] [Bow]
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Coral Pink
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-dampened linen consistent with ZP, finished with a glossy resin coating [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and non-irritating 💪 Plus, with custom hand-painting, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm, card holder 🎀 ➕ gift box 🎁 ➕ upgraded manual 💌
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
170th Anniversary Milk Tea Green, Limited Sale
When Saint Louis meets Anjou, the Anjou Mini Tote is born. The milk tea colorway features a linen and cotton blend for the outer surface ➕ imported matching top-grain calfskin. Exquisite and structured, it is also reversible. Includes coin purse, bag charm, and drawstring closure clip. Comes with a gift bag 🎁 A great choice for gifting or personal use.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660-1

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ~
C House Triomphe Backpack
Super practical Triomphe canvas print backpack. Compared to previous Celine backpacks, this one is much smaller but looks more exquisite and cute.
Don't let the small size fool you; the capacity is very large.
Can be worn casually or mixed with jackets and baseball jackets for a different style.
Style No.: 197662
Color: Beige Brown
Size: 20×10.5×17

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CE New Mini16 Shoulder Bag
The 16 series has a new model again. This time, unlike the previous plain leather, it uses durable grainy leather, showing more texture. Despite being small, the capacity is impressive; it fits two phones easily. Can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, with an adjustable strap. Lightweight!!
Style: Versatile item
Capacity: Among mini bags, the capacity is top-tier, very spacious
Model: 10m443
Color: Tan Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18×12×3.5cm

Genuine quality
Celine New Arrival AA~Mini Square Bag (Headphone Case)
Celine's new mini bag. This year is truly the year of mini bags. Although the capacity isn't huge, the visual and cute appeal are a knockout, accurately capturing the fact that women are visual creatures. Women are just creatures who buy whatever looks good regardless of practicality, hahaha...
Fits lipstick, compact powder, keys
Style No.: 101512 Brown
Size: 11×4×8
Includes original box
